code:
import list
import string

let items = ["red", "green", "blue"]
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(items)
  match list.get(items, i)
  when Some(s)
    if i == 0
      result = s
    else
      result = "#{result}, #{s}"
    end
  when None
    result = result
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(result)
